writeTargets: File System Access API directory handle
preconditions: Project scope is local or folder
Active module path resolves to node.tasks.json
steps: Write back to original node.tasks.json via cached directory handle when available
If direct file write is unavailable, generate a replacement JSON copy for user save/replace
Show explicit warning when save requires manual file replacement

fallbacks.name: save-copy
fallbacks.trigger: No write permission or browser lacks FS write access
fallbacks.action: Use showSaveFilePicker or download blob to save replacement node.tasks.json

fallbacks.name: local-cache-only
fallbacks.action: Persist only to browser localStorage and mark as not committed

successSignals: Returned source is fs-access or local-disk
Or source is save-copy with clear replacement note
